scripts.dev: npm run lint && dotenvx run -- npm run build --watch
scripts.test: npx ts-node tests/basic.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/module.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/cache.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/http.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/security.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: npm run lint && npx ts-node tests/basic.test.ts --watch
scripts.msi:eula: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\WiX Toolset v7.0\bin\wix.exe' eula accept wix7"
scripts.build:msi: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\WiX Toolset v7.0\bin\wix.exe' build .\SesiInstaller.wxs -o .\SesiInstaller.msi"
scripts.build:installer: npm run build:exe && npm run msi:eula && npm run build:msi
scripts.build:mac:installer: npm run build:exe && npm run build:mac:pkg
scripts.upload: npm run build && npm publish --access public
